creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
There must be a shlib change when you update giflib to 4.2.3_3.
Your webp was built with libgif.so.4.

Please update your ports tree, rebuild graphics/giflib and graphics/webp.
After that, you will get libgif.so.6 (giflib 5.0.6) and gif2webp should fine then.

On my box:
% ldd /usr/local/bin/gif2webp
/usr/local/bin/gif2webp:
        libwebpmux.so.1 => /usr/local/lib/libwebpmux.so.1 (0x800824000)
        libwebp.so.5 => /usr/local/lib/libwebp.so.5 (0x800a2b000)
        libgif.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libgif.so.6 (0x800c8d000)
        libthr.so.3 => /lib/libthr.so.3 (0x800e96000)
        libc.so.7 => /lib/libc.so.7 (0x8010bb000)
        libm.so.5 => /lib/libm.so.5 (0x801466000)
